center.name: 曼尼普尔邦
center.summary: 曼尼普尔邦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括那伽鹩鹛，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: [check after splits] --> In India it is found in Nagaland and Manipur. Several former subspecies of this bird have now been recognized as good species
